rationale: Educ. Code §49.308 governs timing and notice for commissioner-ordered property detachments and annexations. It contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts and is not affected by changes to Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The commissioner shall order any detachments and annexations of property under this subchapter not later than November 8 of each year.
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified; §49.308 is procedural and silent on homestead exemption levels.
